title: gilia pungens var. tenuiloba
intro: Gilia pungens var. tenuiloba, also known as a variety of the sky pilot plant, is a type of flowering plant in the phlox family. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful for treating wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Gilia pungens var. tenuiloba include its ability to soothe digestive issues and reduce fever. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water to create a tea that can be used to treat various ailments.
